title: Kustomize, Helm 4, Rendering, Validation, Field Ownership, and Promotion · Mastery Check
summary: A release review compares fresh kustomize, helm 4, rendering, validation, field ownership, and promotion choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for rendered environment release package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases.
Generate ConfigMaps and Secrets from external sources, reason about name hashes and references, restrict loading, and keep secret values out of rendered evidence.
Inspect Helm 4 charts, templates, values schema, dependencies, hooks, release state, OCI identity, install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Kustomize Resources Patches · changed case · Quiz K8s Kustomize Resources Patches
steps.instruction:
